description_long: This object is a firearm with a classic design, featuring a long, dark metal barrel and a wooden stock and handguard. The weapon is equipped with a bayonet affixed to the muzzle, and a curved magazine is visible beneath the receiver. A black sling is attached, running from the stock to the front handguard, suggesting portability. The receiver and trigger assembly are made of metal, with a prominent safety lever and a rounded trigger guard. The overall appearance is robust, with a combination of wood and metal components giving it a traditional, utilitarian look.
description: A long, dark metal shotgun with a wooden stock and handguard, featuring a bayonet and a curved magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and bayonet, with the magazine and stock barely visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, bayonet, and sling.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal detail of the magazine or bayonet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the shotgun's length, wooden components, bayonet, and sling attachment points.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long with attached bayonet, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
